message:
feat(test): expand proptest coverage for reservoir_sampler, entropy_accounting, merkle_tree, storage_telemetry

Add strategies and tests for uncovered serde types:
- reservoir_sampler: SamplerStats strategy + consistency tests (30→37)
- entropy_accounting: PaneEntropySummary, InformationBudget strategies (30→37)
- merkle_tree: ProofStep, MerkleProof, TreeDiff strategies + proof serde (30→39)
- storage_telemetry: StorageTelemetryConfig, StorageDiagnosticSummary strategies (30→36)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
